title: Ludo's Modpack
description:
This is the official modpack of the ItsNotLudo channel, due to high demands of players asking what mods Ludo uses, we have made a full Modpack!

This modpack inludes man PERFORMANCE IMPROVING Mods, QOL Mods and Much, Much more!
body:
# The Official Ludo Modpack which includes all of the Mods that Ludo uses in his Hardcore Minecraft Series!

**Due to Popular Demand the Official Modpack is Finally here!**
This Modpack Includes all of the Mods that Ludo uses to create his videos!

What does this pack add?!
- **Performance mods**
- **Quality Of Life Mods**
- **Useful Camera mods**

This Pack also includes the Shaders that Ludo uses (complimentary Unbound)
[https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)

![Stunning Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c10ef80b73573d55295755751aa11517d4ffe234_0.webp)

![Example of Ludo's Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/905cb80fcdfc6952375f5057d587a01b7838219f_0.webp)

**If you're having trouble using Ludo's shaders settings, import the .txt file in your .minecraft folder.**
![Importing Ludo's shaders setting.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f068833c3f071b3c43ff2807dc47a7d957824097.png)

## Updated whenever Ludo also updates his mods, Make sure to check in for any future updates! 

Currently Being Updated to 1.21.6 as new mods come out.

### Who Is Ludo??
